verdicts.title: ~32k LOC: nine destination families have no live mount on either host
verdicts.note: HomeRoute/InboxRoute/TodosRoute/LibraryRoute/RoutinesRoute/MemoryGateway/ToolsRoute have zero non-test importers, AgentsRoute only appears in a comment, TeamRoute imports nothing from chat-surface (uses features/team/*); desktop renderSurface only mounts run/chats/projects/activity/connectors/tools→SkillsBinder and placeholders the rest (DestinationOutlet.tsx:172-193), yet index.ts:470-709 still exports every dead family.

verdicts.title: Transitional _*-stub.ts wire-type modules persist after canonical api-types landed
verdicts.note: api-types/src/{todos,projects,agents,inbox,library,routines}.ts all exist (e.g. TodoPriority at todos.ts:31 duplicated byte-identically in _todos-stub.ts:38), yet the live ProjectsRoute (mounted App.tsx:885) still imports from ../../api/_projects-stub (ProjectsRoute.tsx:84) whose types are all present in api-types/projects.ts:292-478.

verdicts.title: Web maintains a complete parallel Settings implementation
verdicts.note: SettingsScreen.tsx is 1,405 LOC with a parallel sections/ dir (Appearance/LocalModels/ModelAndBehavior/Notifications/PrivacyAndData/Profile/ProviderKeys/Shortcuts) importing zero chat-surface settings symbols, while desktop mounts the full SettingsSurface + ten pages (SettingsMount.tsx:31-57); settingsNav.ts:11-13 claims it 'replaces' apps/frontend/.../settings/sections.ts which still exists on disk.

verdicts.title: Shared components built to replace web scaffolds finished but never adopted
verdicts.note: WebhookCreateWizard (831 LOC) is only comment-referenced in apps while WebhooksRoute.tsx:420 keeps WebhookCreateWizardScaffold; ConnectorDetailView and TemplateGallery are only comment-referenced (ConnectorDetailRoute.tsx:14, TemplateGalleryRoute.tsx:6); WebhookSecurityPage, ChatsSidebar/ChatsDestination have zero apps importers; ProjectFilterChip's only usage-sites are the dead library/ family.

verdicts.title: Flagship Run cockpit is desktop-only; approval reducer exists twice
verdicts.note: web run slug mounts legacy ChatScreen (App.tsx:838-857) with RunDestination having zero web importers, and approvalProjection.ts:18-19 explicitly states its reduction 'mirrors the host-owned approval reducer in apps/frontend/.../chatModel' — which exists at features/chat/chatModel/approval.ts.

verdicts.title: Tolerant hand-rolled contract parsers re-derive server shapes; dead toError
verdicts.note: parseRunList accepts bare array/{runs}/{items} with snake or camel fields (useRunSession.ts:387-437) and runIdFromCreateResponse accepts run_id/runId/id flat-or-nested (RunDestination.tsx:660-679); toError is defined at useRunSession.ts:456 with no callers anywhere, while the stream path already uses the api-types isRuntimeEventEnvelope guard.

verdicts.title: Hardcoded per-provider model catalogs
verdicts.note: PROVIDER_CATALOG hardcodes model lists (claude-opus-4, gpt-4o, gemini-2.5-pro) at providerKeys.ts:56-95, with divergent dead copies FALLBACK_MODELS at AgentEditor.tsx:224 (claude-opus-4-7) and model default at RoutineEditor.tsx:207 (claude-opus-4-7) — one instance of the repo's known divergent-model-list problem.

verdicts.title: Approval decisions are fire-and-forget; can show false receipt
verdicts.note: resolveApproval sets the optimistic local decision then POSTs with .catch(() => {}) (RunDestination.tsx:459-468); the comment concedes 'a failure leaves the optimistic state (the trailing SSE frame is the authority)', so if the POST fails while the stream is also down no reconciling approval_resolved frame arrives and the consent card shows a permanent false approved/rejected receipt.

verdicts.title: Doc drift in packages/chat-surface/CLAUDE.md (skills listed as folded/legacy; settings claim)
verdicts.note: Low-severity doc-drift finding accepted as-is per verification protocol.

verdicts.title: Barrel-export accretion: index.ts exports full dead surface
verdicts.note: Low-severity barrel-bloat finding accepted as-is; consistent with confirmed F1/F4 dead exports.
